message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array of 3 objects. Each object: question: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback and complies boolean.

We analyze text: It says introduction includes three parts: 1) topic relevance and/or motivation. 2) Thesis goal and tasks. 3) Brief description of each chapter and appendix content. It doesn't list main sections of thesis, just intro parts. So question 1: Does text list main sections of thesis? No. So fails. Provide feedback: text lists intro parts not thesis sections. Complies false.

Question 2: Does text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes intro parts, but not each section. So fails. Provide feedback. Complies false.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood general structure of thesis from this text? It only gives intro parts, not overall structure. So fails. Provide feedback. Complies false.

Thus all false. Provide JSON array accordingly.
